reviews.review_description: I love whole idea but you definitely need more rooms to explore and collect items which you can put inside washing machine. My favourite one is boombox which still plays music whilst spinning 😄

I've made a mistake running the washing machine without closing it's lid first.. 😂
It's really funny and so much room to improve.. 
What else to say?

🎼You spin me right round, baby, right round
Like a record, baby, right round, round, round
You spin me right round, baby, right round
Like a record, baby, right round, round, round🎶

Wasn’t sure what to expect going into Washing Machine Simulator VR,  the developers somehow turned a mundane household chore into an oddly satisfying but weird VR experience. If you think you have VR legs this is for you, if you want to see if you have VR legs this is for you!!  Just do NOT do the laundry with the door open is all I will say, this one’s worth a spin. 🌀  And as it further develops I shall up my score from 4 to 5 stars and I will ask the devs to put in a panic 'stop' the spin button!

developer_response.body: Magicmerlin007, you have an "X" as a stop button, there is an information at the beginning of the game. ;) We are really happy that you like the game, thank you for the review. :)

reviews.review_title: For cat and laundry day fans
reviews.review_description: Who doesn't know the urge to do your laundry in VR? It is much more entertaining than in real life. This game got you covered! As a bonus you can also mess around with various objects and look at an impressive cat gallery. 😂 A hillarious experience
An interesting game, still in early access. A must-try for users who love exploring new experiences!

developer_response.body: Yes, it is an experience! Thank you for the review. :)

reviews.review_description: Good implementation of an interesting idea. Great music and graphics. There is still a room for improvement but considering the price it's worth it.

I get no motion sickness in VR at all but I just realized that swirling in washing machine is different one.
If any one want to try this one, a chair after you is really in need.
And no way for turning control?

I can now strike getting inside a moving washer machine with my tennis ball off my bucket list!!

Everything looks really good and physics are amazing!  Not a game but an experience!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are happy that you liked the experience!

reviews.review_title: Spin-Cycle Chaos with a Wholesome Twist
reviews.review_description: Totally ridiculous and fun. You do laundry, get spun around, throw stuff, and read sweet pet stories. Weirdly wholesome.

I finally were able to feel what I does to my cat when I was young !
PS : Please add joystick rotation! :)
I had alo of fun trying everything out,especially the darts,tennis balls and cool music.

reviews.review_title: Nice idea and nice to explore
reviews.review_description: A funny idea and beautifully executed. I'm excited to see what's next.
Good graphics and good ideas. Still in early access.
